ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state of the region */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country of the region */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the region */,
  "long_" REAL /* Longitude of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "covid_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "confirmed" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recoveries */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "fips" INTEGER /* FIPS code of the region */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases for the last update */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths for the last update */,
  "new_recovered" INTEGER /* Number of new recoveries for the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_covid_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "testing_data" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each testing data entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the data belongs to */,
  "incident_rate" REAL /* Incident rate of the region */,
  "total_test_results" INTEGER /* Total number of test results */,
  "people_hospitalized" INTEGER /* Number of people hospitalized */,
  "case_fatality_ratio" REAL /* Case fatality ratio of the region */,
  "uid" INTEGER /* UID of the region */,
  "iso3" TEXT /* ISO3 code of the region */,
  "testing_rate" INTEGER /* Testing rate of the region */,
  "hospitalization_rate" INTEGER /* Hospitalization rate of the region */,
  "positive_rate" REAL /* Positive rate of tests for the region */,
  "negative_rate" REAL /* Negative rate of tests for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_testing_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the system was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the prediction belongs to */,
  "predicted_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_cases" INTEGER /* Number of predicted cases */,
  "predicted_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of predicted deaths */,
  "predicted_recoveries" INTEGER /* Number of predicted recoveries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "integration_date" TEXT /* Date when the external data source was integrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
